title: DXC Technology India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DXC Technology India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
